comment: NMA of systemic therapies for advanced non-small-cell lung cancer, overall survival (HRs). A denser, LOOPY network (immunotherapies vs chemotherapy/docetaxel with multiple direct comparisons) so loop consistency is assessable. Mixes lines/histologies/PD-L1 strata — an honest limitation stated in the capsule.
primary_estimand: hazard ratio for overall survival versus chemotherapy
